content.full_text:
P.O. BOX 807 • SACRAMENTO, 95804 ••• 1100 K STREET BUllDIN13, SACRAMENTO, 95814 
(916) 322·5662 
Margaret L. Long 
Administration 
322·5660 
1150 Sereno Drive 
Vallejo, California 94589 
Dear Ms. Long: 
Executive/legal 
322·5901 
July 22, 1981 
Enforcement 
322-6441 
Statements of Economic Interest 
322-6444 
This is in reply to your letter dated July 2, 1981, concerning 
campaign reporting for the Solano County Democratic Central 
Committee. 
Enclosed is a copy of the 111981 Information Manual on Campaign 
Provisions of the Political Reform Act." 
Please read the 
explanation on page 4 of the manual to determine if your com-
mittee is required to file a semi-annual campaign statement 
covering the period January 1 through June 30. 
(If the commit-
tee has received or made contributions or made any independent 
expenditures in any amount during that time period, it will be 
required to file a semi-annual statement. 
Regarding contributions received in connection with the fund-
raiser to be held on July 18, the committee will not have to 
file a threshold statement because of contributions it receives. 
Only if it makes contributions or independent expenditures of 
$500 or more will it be required to file the statement due on 
September 22. 
Therefore, if the committee does not make contri-
butions or independent expenditures totaling $500 or more during 
the third and fourth threshold periods and if it was not required 
to file a semi-annual statement covering the period January 1 
through June 30, the first campaign statement required would 
cover the period January 1 through December 31, and would be 
due no later than January 31, 1982. 
Regarding the check for the VIP program, I need some additional 
information before a determination can be made as to the proper 
method of reporting. 
Please call me collect at (916)322-5662 
at your convenience so we can discuss it. 
Jeanne Pritchard 
Political Reform Consultant

sections.question_synthetic: What are the campaign reporting requirements for the Solano County Democratic Central Committee, including semi-annual statement filing obligations and threshold statement requirements for contributions and expenditures?
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The committee must file a semi-annual statement if it received or made any contributions or independent expenditures during January 1 through June 30. It is not required to file a threshold statement based on contributions received, but must file if it makes contributions or independent expenditures of $500 or more. If no threshold filing is required and no semi-annual statement was due, the first required statement would cover January 1 through December 31 and be due by January 31, 1982.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Document lacks formal QUESTION and CONCLUSION section headers; question and conclusion synthesized from body text. Dated July 22, 1981 (note discrepancy with document ID year 1980). Request for additional information regarding VIP program check reporting noted but details not fully resolved in this letter.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: What are the campaign reporting requirements for the Solano County Democratic Central Committee, including semi-annual statement filing obligations and threshold statement requirements for contributions and expenditures?

CONCLUSION: The committee must file a semi-annual statement if it received or made any contributions or independent expenditures during January 1 through June 30. It is not required to file a threshold statement based on contributions received, but must file if it makes contributions or independent expenditures of $500 or more. If no threshold filing is required and no semi-annual statement was due, the first required statement would cover January 1 through December 31 and be due by January 31, 1982.

embedding.summary: FPPC response to inquiry about campaign reporting requirements for Solano County Democratic Central Committee, providing guidance on semi-annual statement filing obligations and threshold statement thresholds based on contribution and expenditure amounts.
